Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Planner.PlanLearningObjectivesColumn

Represents settings and value for the plan 'Learning objectives' column.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Name

The column custom name.

 string

None.
Order

The column order.

 integer

None.
LocalizedName

The localization term.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LocalizedText

None.
LearningObjectives

The list of learning objectives for plan.

 Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Planner.PlanLearningObjective

None.
